title: Notification No.94/2008-Cus(NT), dated 25.07.2008
text: [ TO BE PUBLISHED IN THE GAZETTE OF INDIA, EXTRAORDINARY, PART II, SECTION 3, SUBSECTION (ii) ] GOVERNMENT OF INDIA MINISTRY OF FINANCE (DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE) Notification No. 94 / 2008-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 25th July, 2008 3 Sravana, 1930 Saka. S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs (Import), Customs House, Chennai to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on,- (i) the Commissioner of Customs and Central Excise, Hyderabad-III; (ii) the Commissioner of Customs, Inter Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi; (iii) the Commissioner of Customs and Central Excise, Hyderabad-II; (iv) the Commissioner of Customs (Import), Jawaharlal Nehru Custom House, Nhava Sheva; (v) the Commissioner of Customs (Import), New Custom House, Ballard Estate, New Delhi; (vi) the Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Tuticorin; and (vii) the Commissioner of Customs, Pune, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Aman Enterprise, T- 21/A, Khirki Extension, Delhi and others, issued vide, F.No.DRI/SRU/INV-04/2006, dated the 31st December, 2007 by the Additional Director General, Directorate General of Revenue Intelligence, Ahmedabad Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad. [F.No. 437/35/2008-Cus.IV] (Aseem Kumar) Under Secretary to the government of India -- 1 of 1 --
